Privacy

Privacy summary for the public indie release

TableTop Nexus is designed to work offline. If you do not sign in, your profile, saves, stats, and match history remain on your own device.

If you enable optional cloud sync, the app stores profile metadata, settings, save slots, and match history needed to keep your account consistent across supported devices.

The public website may receive standard hosting, security, and analytics logs from the platform used to deploy it. Download activity may also be logged by GitHub Releases when you fetch installers or checksums.

We do not sell profile or gameplay data. If telemetry or crash reporting is introduced in a later release, this page should be updated before that collection is enabled.

Contact support@tabletopnexus.app if you need help with account data, sync issues, or privacy-related questions. Last updated: 2026-04-07.

TableTop Nexus

Offline-first board, card, and party games for polished desktop play.

Published by DigiSolUK. Need help? support@tabletopnexus.app
